The '''Pazaak Den''' was a private club in the [[Entertainment Promenade]] of the [[Refugee Sector]] of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] for hard-core [[Gambler/Legends|gamblers]] looking for a match at the most common card game of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] around [[3951 BBY]], [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]]. Known for the proud nature of its patrons, the Den was generally avoided by all but the pros, which suited them fine. The password "Holdout" was required to enter, and some patrons comment on the [[Exchange]] watching the tables.<ref name="KotOR II" />

A [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] known as "[[The Champ]]" was the long-time reigning champion at the Pazaak Den and supposedly would only play someone if he deemed them worthy enough. In her quest to find [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Zez-Kai Ell]], the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] visited the Pazaak Den and defeated the other players in order to draw "The Champ" out. She then beat him three times in a row at pazaak, a feat that caused "The Champ" to declare that he could no longer win and to then give the Exile his rare tie-breaker card.<ref name="KotOR II" />

Notable players in the Pazaak Den aside from "The Champ" included the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Dahnis]], the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Geredi]] and [[S4-C8-GE3]], a [[GE3-series protocol droid]] that was transferring data to [[G0-T0]] via a module hooked up under its left arm.<ref name="KotOR II" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Pazaak Den appears only in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. If the player has [[Atton Rand]] in their party or the Exile is male then Dahnis will forfeit her game.<ref name="KotOR II" />

The player also does not have to find the password in order to gain entry, they can use [[Mind trick/Legends|Force Persuade]] on the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] guard at the door instead. Also there will be a group of Gran asking for [[Geredi]]. If you talk to them they will ask you to get him to come out of the den. If you agree, you lie to him telling him that there is an attractive Twi'lek woman outside waiting for him and he will get out. Then, he gets killed by the group of Gran. You find out that he owed money to the [[Exchange]].<ref name="KotOR II" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
